name: The Charles Schwab Corporation Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 4.450% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series J
summary: The Charles Schwab Corporation Depositary Shares represent a fractional interest in preferred stock and pay non-cumulative dividends. The Charles Schwab Corporation is a savings and loan holding company providing financial services. The headquarter location is in Westlake, Texas.
